reasoning: Claude identified this as instructional content showing multiple FLS tasks rather than a single peg transfer performance. GPT-4o attempted to score it as a performance with timing and penalties. Given the fundamental disagreement about video content type, Claude's assessment that this is educational material rather than a scoreable performance attempt is more conservative and appropriate.
